revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-4-285

A split-phase motor in which the auxiliary winding is energised only during the starting operation and either is connected in series with a resistor or has sufficient inherent resistance not to require an additional resistor.

{{IALAFooter}}
